_comment: FORGE maintenance/repair procedures for the PL45LM-class turn-mill. Distilled and re-authored into structured steps from general CNC mill practice (Artisans Asylum CC startup/shutdown workflow; Haas/Tormach operator-manual style). No manual text is reproduced verbatim. The model walks these one step at a time via start_procedure + procedure_step.

spindle_warmup.title: Spindle warm-up
warnings: Never skip warm-up on a cold spindle — thermal growth throws off Z and can pre-load bearings.

steps.text: Confirm the spindle area is clear and the door is closed.
Run the spindle at 500 rpm for 3 minutes.
Step to 1500 rpm for 3 minutes.
Step to 3000 rpm for 3 minutes.
Step to rated/max test speed for 3 minutes, then ramp down.
steps.warning: Stop immediately if you hear grinding or see a temperature spike.

steps.text: Verify spindle load returns to baseline at idle. Warm-up complete.

tool_change.title: Manual tool change (BT40)
prerequisites: LOTO not required for guarded manual change at the spindle, but verify motion is inhibited
warnings: Keep a hand under the holder — it drops on unclamp.
Never press unclamp with the spindle rotating.

steps.text: Confirm the spindle has fully stopped and motion is inhibited.
Support the tool holder by hand, then press and hold spindle UNCLAMP.
Remove the holder; inspect the taper and pull stud for nicks or coolant residue.
Wipe the spindle taper clean and dry. Inspect for fretting.
Insert the new holder, release UNCLAMP to draw it in, and confirm it seats with a positive clamp.
If the holder was reassembled, verify the retention bolts to spec.
Tug-test the holder by hand. Record the tool change in the work log.

drawbar_inspection.title: Drawbar / unclamp inspection
warnings: Lockout/tagout is MANDATORY — the unclamp cylinder is hydraulically powerful.
Disc springs store energy; back off the locknut in a controlled manner.

steps.text: Confirm LOTO is applied and verified before any disassembly.
Remove the spindle top cap to expose the drawbar and disc-spring stack.
Cycle unclamp manually (energy isolated) and feel for hesitation or binding.
Measure the disc-spring stack free length; replace as a set if below the limit.
Inspect the unclamp cylinder seals for weep.
Reassemble; set the drawbar locknut and verify clamp force with a load cell.
Remove LOTO per procedure, then function-test ten clamp/unclamp cycles.

coolant_union_service.title: Through-spindle coolant union service
warnings: Bleed through-spindle coolant pressure to zero before opening the union.

steps.text: Confirm LOTO and that coolant pressure reads zero.
Disconnect the coolant line and remove the rotary union.
Replace the carbon face seal; inspect the rotating seat for scoring.
Reinstall, reconnect, restore LOTO, and leak-test at 20 bar.
